bugs.root_cause: 4 lines replaced/restructured
bugs.fix: Rewrote 5→3 lines (4 removed)

bugs.error_message: SECURITY DEFINER RPCs accept caller-supplied p_user_id without validating against auth.uid() — privilege escalation vulnerability
bugs.root_cause: All 7 SECURITY DEFINER functions bypassed RLS and trusted caller-supplied p_user_id without comparing to auth.uid(): record_purchase, update_purchase, delete_purchase, produce_sub_recipe, deduct_sub_recipe_stock, delete_production, update_production
bugs.fix: Added 'IF p_user_id IS DISTINCT FROM auth.uid() THEN RAISE EXCEPTION Unauthorized' guard at the top of each function. Also added SET search_path = public to all. No client-side changes needed.

bugs.error_message: user_profiles table referenced in middleware but has no migration file — RLS status unknown
bugs.root_cause: Table was created manually in Supabase dashboard without being tracked in migrations. No RLS policy was confirmed to exist.
bugs.fix: Added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS + ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + SELECT policy + trigger for auto-creating profile on new user signup in migration 008.

bugs.error_message: Hapus/edit produksi mengembalikan stok bahan baku/setengah jadi dengan jumlah SALAH bila resep diedit setelah produksi dicatat (BOM tidak di-snapshot). Juga my-kitchen-book DB ketinggalan migrasi 017/019/020.
bugs.root_cause: delete_production/update_production merekonstruksi qty konsumsi dari recipe_items LIVE, bukan dari yang benar-benar dipakai saat produksi. Edit resep di antara produksi & penghapusan -> restore stok salah/tidak sama sekali.
bugs.fix: Migrasi 021: tabel production_items menyimpan snapshot per-batch quantity_used saat produce_recipe/produce_sub_recipe. delete/update restore dari snapshot (fallback ke recipe_items live untuk produksi lama tanpa snapshot). Apply ke tata-data-dapur + my-kitchen-book (plus 020 guard ke my-kitchen-book).

bugs.error_message: Stok bahan "Tepung" tidak cukup: tersedia 600.0000, dibutuhkan 3000 — toast error muncul di background saat klik Produksi & Jual di halaman penjualan
bugs.root_cause: handleProduceAndSell langsung memanggil RPC produce_recipe/produce_sub_recipe tanpa pre-check stok bahan baku/setengah jadi. Jika bahan kurang, DB exception ditangkap sebagai toast.error, bukan modal informatif.
bugs.fix: Tambah pre-check di handleProduceAndSell sebelum loop RPC: iterasi semua shortfall recipes, cek recipe_items (item_id dan sub_recipe_id) vs stok. Jika ada shortfall, set itemConfirm state dan return. Tambah ItemShortfall interface + itemConfirm state + modal UI (z-[70], info-only, Batal button). Sama dengan fix bug-9a0ad3d di produksi page.
